Family Involvement Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers that family or a significant other be involved in care discussions. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
206 F0800J_STF_PRVT_PHNE_CD F0800J_STF_PRVT_PHNE_CD F0800J Staff Assessment: Private Phone Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to use the phone in private. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked
